problem_title: Bicycle Shop Database Schema with SQLAlchemy
question: Write code to create a database schema for an online bicycle shop that sells bicycles as well as their spare parts and accessories. Use SQAlchemy library to communicate with the database. The code should cover opening and closing of a new connection to the database, creation of necessary tables and their relations, common operations on items in the tables such as addition, deletion, updates, filtered selection and search.

0.0:
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, DateTime, ForeignKey, Table
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from datetime import datetime

engine = create_engine('sqlite:///bicycle_shop.db')
Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class SparePart(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'spare_parts'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'))
    spare_part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('spare_parts.id'))
    accessory_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('accessories.id'))
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", backref="orders")
    spare_part = relationship("SparePart", backref="orders")
    accessory = relationship("Accessory", backref="orders")

Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)
session = Session()

def add_bicycle(name, description, price):
    bicycle = Bicycle(name=name, description=description, price=price)
    session.add(bicycle)
    session.commit()

def add_spare_part(name, description, price):
    spare_part = SparePart(name=name, description=description, price=price)
    session.add(spare_part)
    session.commit()

def add_accessory(name, description, price):
    accessory = Accessory(name=name, description=description, price=price)
    session.add(accessory)
    session.commit()

def add_order(bicycle_id, spare_part_id, accessory_id):
    order = Order(bicycle_id=bicycle_id, spare_part_id=spare_part_id, accessory_id=accessory_id)
    session.add(order)
    session.commit()

def delete_bicycle(id):
    bicycle = session.query(Bicycle).filter_by(id=id).first()
    session.delete(bicycle)
    session.commit()

def delete_spare_part(id):
    spare_part = session.query(SparePart).filter_by(id=id).first()
    session.delete(spare_part)
    session.commit()

def delete_accessory(id):
    accessory = session.query(Accessory).filter_by(id=id).first()
    session.delete(accessory)
    session.commit()

def delete_order(id):
    order = session.query(Order).filter_by(id=id).first()
    session.delete(order)
    session.commit()

def update_bicycle(id, name, description, price):
    bicycle = session.query(Bicycle).filter_by(id=id).first()
    bicycle.name = name
    bicycle.description = description
    bicycle.price = price
    session.commit()

def update_spare_part(id, name, description, price):
    spare_part = session.query(SparePart).filter_by(id=id).first()
    spare_part.name = name
    spare_part.description = description
    spare_part.price = price
    session.commit()

def update_accessory(id, name, description, price):
    accessory = session.query(Accessory).filter_by(id=id).first()
    accessory.name = name
    accessory.description = description
    accessory.price = price
    session.commit()

def get_bicycles():
    return session.query(Bicycle).all()

def get_spare_parts():
    return session.query(SparePart).all()

def get_accessories():
    return session.query(Accessory).all()

def get_orders():
    return session.query(Order).all()

def search_bicycles(name):
    return session.query(Bicycle).filter(Bicycle.name.like('%' + name + '%')).all()

def search_spare_parts(name):
    return session.query(SparePart).filter(SparePart.name.like('%' + name + '%')).all()

def search_accessories(name):
    return session.query(Accessory).filter(Accessory.name.like('%' + name + '%')).all()

def close_session():
    session.close()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class SparePart(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'spare_parts'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'))
    spare_part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('spare_parts.id'))
    accessory_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('accessories.id'))
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle")
    spare_part = relationship("SparePart")

from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, DateTime, ForeignKey, Table
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from datetime import datetime

engine = create_engine('sqlite:///cycle_store.db')
Base = declarative_base()

class Bike(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bikes'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    description = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    components = relationship('Component', backref='bike')
    attachments = relationship('Attachment', backref='bike')

class Component(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'components'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    description = Column(String)
    bike_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bikes.id'))
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Attachment(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'attachments'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    description = Column(String)
    bike_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bikes.id'))
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    bike_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bikes.id'))
    customer_name = Column(String)
    customer_email = Column(String)
    order_date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    bike = relationship('Bike', backref='orders')

class Review(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'reviews'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    bike_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bikes.id'))
    customer_name = Column(String)
    review = Column(String)
    rating = Column(Integer)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    bike = relationship('Bike', backref='reviews')

Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)
session = Session()

def add_bike(name, price, description):
    bike = Bike(name=name, price=price, description=description)
    session.add(bike)
    session.commit()

def add_component(bike_id, name, price, description):
    component = Component(bike_id=bike_id, name=name, price=price, description=description)
    session.add(component)
    session.commit()

def add_attachment(bike_id, name, price, description):
    attachment = Attachment(bike_id=bike_id, name=name, price=price, description=description)
    session.add(attachment)
    session.commit()

def get_bike(id):
    return session.query(Bike).filter_by(id=id).first()

def get_components(bike_id):
    return session.query(Component).filter_by(bike_id=bike_id).all()

def get_attachments(bike_id):
    return session.query(Attachment).filter_by(bike_id=bike_id).all()

def update_bike(id, name, price, description):
    bike = session.query(Bike).filter_by(id=id).first()
    bike.name = name
    bike.price = price
    bike.description = description
    session.commit()

def delete_bike(id):
    bike = session.query(Bike).filter_by(id=id).first()
    session.delete(bike)
    session.commit()

def add_order(bike_id, customer_name, customer_email):
    order = Order(bike_id=bike_id, customer_name=customer_name, customer_email=customer_email)
    session.add(order)
    session.commit()

def add_review(bike_id, customer_name, review, rating):
    review_obj = Review(bike_id=bike_id, customer_name=customer_name, review=review, rating=rating)
    session.add(review_obj)
    session.commit()

def get_orders(bike_id):
    return session.query(Order).filter_by(bike_id=bike_id).all()

def get_reviews(bike_id):
    return session.query(Review).filter_by(bike_id=bike_id).all()

from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from datetime import datetime

engine = create_engine('sqlite:///cycle_store.db')
Base = declarative_base()

class Bike(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bikes'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    description = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    components = relationship('Component', backref='bike')

class Component(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'components'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    description = Column(String)
    bike_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bikes.id'))
    attachments = relationship('Attachment', backref='component')

class Attachment(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'attachments'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    description = Column(String)
    component_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('components.id'))

Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)

    session.add(bike)

def add_component(bike_id, name, price, description):

def add_attachment(component_id, name, price, description):

    return session.query(Bike).get(id)

    return session.query(Component).get(id)

def get_attachment(id):

    session.delete(bike)

def delete_component(id):

    session.commit()

    attachment = session.query(Attachment).get(id)
    session.delete(attachment)
    session.commit()
